name: Spanish to English
response:
The English translation of 'La inteligencia artificial está cambiando el mundo de maneras sorprendentes.' is:

"Artificial intelligence is changing the world in surprising ways."

This sentence highlights the novel and sometimes unexpected impact of AI on various aspects of life and society.
